caption: A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a black t-shirt with a yellow logo, is positioned in front of a computer screen displaying a Google Sheets spreadsheet. The spreadsheet is titled "TH 5/13 - 2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION Baseba..." and contains lists of names and card details, including "Paul Jon MCKEN GRIFFEY JR 5/20" and "Jason Franky JOHNNY BENCH 10/20." The man is centered in a video overlay that sits on top of the spreadsheet. Below the video, a red "Subscribe" button and the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" are visible. Across the frames, the man remains in a similar pose, though his facial expression shifts slightly. The spreadsheet content remains static, though a blue highlight moves down the list of names from the top entries toward the middle of the page.
